# Four Minute Drill

> Free daily NFL football game at https://www.fourminutedrill.com — draft six
> real players under a $25 salary cap, then call every play of one do-or-die
> drive (4:00 left, down 3, own 20). Everyone gets the same daily board and
> drive seed; only the player's decisions differ. No account, ~90 seconds.

- Outcomes are sampled from real NFL play-by-play, 2015–2025 (nflverse).
- Scoring: touchdown 100 / field goal 40, × a clutch bonus up to ×2.0 at 0:00;
  scoreless drives bank 0.5 points per yard advanced.
- Ghost racing: share links encode the drive's exact plays, so a recipient
  races the sharer's actual drive clock-synced on the same field.
- New daily at midnight US Eastern; one attempt per daily, unlimited free play.
- Leaderboards: today's drill, all-time, win streaks, longest drives.

## Pages
- https://www.fourminutedrill.com/ : play the game
- https://www.fourminutedrill.com/about.html : rules, scoring, FAQ
- https://www.fourminutedrill.com/privacy.html : privacy
